layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deep in 'Extreme Fear' territory with a score of 25/100, and it's getting worse. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.4%, which means money is flowing away from smaller coins and into Bitcoin for safety. Nearly every coin on the watchlist has bearish chart patterns, with prices sitting below key moving averages. While some coins look tempting after big drops, none of them have shown convincing signs of bottoming out yet.
layman_action: Stay on the sidelines and keep your cash ready. Wait for fear to stabilize or reverse, and for at least one candidate to show a clear bounce off support with rising volume before committing money.
expert_reasoning: All swing candidates present problematic setups. BONK has RSI near 31 (approaching our reliable oversold trigger) but its chart is strongly bearish (-2.0 bias) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — classic capitulation patterns that often precede further downside before any bounce. LIT is overbought at RSI 71 with terrible risk/reward (0.25x). AERO and VVV have poor risk/reward ratios (0.45x and similar). ETH is the cleanest setup with RSI 39, but it's below all MAs with a -0.7 chart bias and only 1.41x risk/reward — not compelling enough for a new entry. The macro backdrop of worsening extreme fear (25, down from 27 yesterday) and rising BTC dominance (56.4%) creates headwinds for all altcoin trades. Better to wait for fear to stabilize and for a confirmed support bounce.
risk_factors: Fear & Greed trending lower — could indicate further capitulation ahead before any recovery
BTC dominance at 56.4% and rising actively drains capital from altcoins, suppressing recovery potential
No candidates show confirmed support bounces or bullish reversal patterns — catching falling knives
watch_list: ETH RSI dropping below 30 — would trigger a high-confidence oversold bounce setup based on our 80% RSI win rate
Fear & Greed Index stabilizing above 25 or reversing upward — first sign the selling pressure is exhausting
BONK for a potential hammer/morning star reversal candle at current levels after extreme -26% weekly selloff
market_context: The crypto market is in a risk-off environment with Extreme Fear at 25/100 and worsening. BTC is relatively stable (+0.18% 24h) but dominance at 56.4% signals capital rotation away from alts, making altcoin swing trades especially hazardous.
context_banner: Extreme Fear is intensifying with no confirmed reversal signals — disciplined patience protects capital for better entries ahead.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 and worsening (down from 27 yesterday, weekly avg 25.4) — historically precedes either capitulation bottoms or further downside, but no reversal signal yet.
ETH RSI at 39 and BONK at 31 are approaching oversold territory — our most reliable signal (80% win rate) — but neither has hit the <30 threshold that maximizes edge.
All candidates are below major MAs with bearish chart biases ranging from -0.2 to -2.0. No bullish reversal candlestick patterns detected on any candidate.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors could add selling pressure as recipients liquidate recovered crypto — a potential near-term headwind.
ETH derivatives reset noted by Blockworks suggests positioning is clearing out, which could set the stage for a cleaner move once sentiment improves.
